arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot reveals new invitation to Jurgen Klopp after seeing gesture fall flat
arts.sum: Jurgen Klopp left Liverpool at the end of last season but new head coach Arne Slot hit the ground running at Anfield and looks set to deliver success for the Reds before the term is done

arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains Darwin Nunez stance and addresses Alisson Becker Liverpool future
arts.sum: Arne Slot was asked about the futures of Darwin Nunez and Alisson Becker ahead of Liverpool's trip to Man City

arts.ttl: I saw Pep Guardiola's fury at Carragher's wild Erling Haaland theory amid Man City future hint
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola was in utter disbelief when Jamie Carragher's theory about Erling Haaland's injury vs Real Madrid was put to him.

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Virgil van Dijk drops clear transfer hint as Arne Slot shares Man City theory
arts.sum: Liverpool renew rivalries with former title rivals Manchester City on Sunday and Reds captain Virgil van Dijk has once again spoken out on his future ahead of the game

arts.ttl: Man City without four players for Liverpool as Pep Guardiola sweats on Erling Haaland injury
arts.sum: Man City injury and team news ahead of the huge Premier League clash with Liverpool as Erling Haaland remains a doubt

arts.ttl: Liverpool Predicted Lineup vs. Manchester City: Premier League
arts.sum: Liverpool visit Manchester City looking for thee points to increase their lead over Arsenal in the Premier League title race.

arts.ttl: Manchester City Predicted Lineup vs. Liverpool: Premier League
arts.sum: Manchester City host Liverpool at Etihad Stadium to reignite one of the fiercest Premier League rivalries of recent times.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola makes brutally honest sack admission as Man City struggles laid bare
arts.sum: Manchester City have endured a difficult season and Pep Guardiola is under no illusions about the fact that he could have been facing the sack at any other club

arts.ttl: How Darwin Nunez became the most wasteful striker in England and the stat which will be worrying the £85m man and Liverpool fans alike
arts.sum: THE SHARPE END: When Liverpool announced the £85million signing of striker Nunez just a day after Erling Haaland joined Man City, it felt like it could be the dawn of a great Premier League rivalry.

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp turns down invitation for Liverpool return as Arne Slot explains exchange
arts.sum: Arne Slot has revealed that Jurgen Klopp rejected an invite to attend Liverpool's clashes with Real Madrid and Man City late last year
